plugins.name: protocollant
plugins.description: Automatically maintains a structured knowledge base in docs/ and keeps CLAUDE.md in sync.

plugins.name: mem0
plugins.description: Persistent memory for Claude Code via mem0. Fully implicit — no manual commands.

plugins.name: website-commenter
plugins.description: Browser extension bridge that lets you comment on DOM elements and send feedback directly to Claude Code. Run /wc-connect to start the bridge — channel notifications interrupt Claude immediately when comments arrive.
